titleStmt.title: SII 34.102: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 102. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman [Gaṇḍarāditya], 7th year, Karkaṭaka, Friday, Tiruvōṇam = 956.

Incomplete. The sabhā of Śrīkaṇṭa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam sold a part of the water rights of their tank to Vēdi-vēḷār to irrigate some land by the latter from the sabhā of Peruveṅgūr. The sabhā permitted water to be drawn from the fourth kaṇṇāṟu (branch canal) flowing to the west of the main canal Śrīkaṇṭa-vāykkāl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kOvirājakEcari paṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu teṉkarai brahmatEyam śrīkaṇṭa caturvetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyOm Ivāṇṭu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa tiruvōṇattiṉāṉṟu pakal Eṅkaḷūr brahmasdhāṉattēy dhanmi cētu peruṅkuṟi kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Iruveṟumpiyūrāḻvār śrīvimānam Eḻuntaruḷuvitta kiḷiyūr nāṭṭuc ciṟutavūruṭaiyāṉ veṇṭai
ṉa vētivēḷār Ittiruveṟumpiyūrāḻvāṟkkup peru veṅkūr sabhaiyār pakkal vilaikoṇṭa nilattukku Eṅkaḷ kuḷattu nīrēy cantrādittavaṟ pāyavum Iññīr pāyak kumiḻikkum vāykkālukkum
Ikkuḷattukkīḻ śrīkaṇṭavāykkālukku mēkku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟē kumiḻi vaittukkoṇṭu Ikkaṇṇāṟṟēy teḷivukāl kōl Akalattāl vaṭakku nōkkippōy Ivvūr tēvarkku vilaikoṇṭu
Ikkuḷattu nīrē koṇṭu Iṉnilattukku pāyappeṟuvatāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttukkoṇṭa vilaipporuḷ nāṅkaḷ tiruveḷḷaṟai kaviṇiyaṉbha ṭṭaṉ śrīdharan kīraṉ brāhmaṇitāyanīli pa
Digital edition of SII 34.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
